'''Tarneel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who headed the [[Peace Brigade]] on [[Ord Sedra]]. During the [[Battle of Ord Sedra]], he was [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-pushed]] by [[Kyle Katarn]] and taken into custody. It is unknown what happened to him during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] prison breakout.

==Behind the scenes==
Although not named in the comic, Tarneel was named in the script. Author [[Nathan Butler]] named the character after the [[Wikipedia:North Carolina Tar Heels|Tar Heels]].<ref name="ChronoRadio">''[http://www.starwarsfanworks.com/chronoradio/crse2.html ChronoRadio Special Edition II: The Making of a Tale]'' (49:08)</ref>
